redCheckpoint.command: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm vitest run src/shared/chatbridge/apps/weather-dashboard.test.ts src/renderer/components/chatbridge/apps/weather/WeatherDashboardPanel.test.tsx src/renderer/components/chatbridge/apps/ReviewedAppLaunchSurface.test.tsx test/integration/chatbridge/scenarios/weather-dashboard-flagship.test.ts

greenCheckpoints.command: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm vitest run src/shared/chatbridge/apps/weather-dashboard.test.ts src/renderer/components/chatbridge/apps/weather/WeatherDashboardPanel.test.tsx src/renderer/components/chatbridge/apps/ReviewedAppLaunchSurface.test.tsx test/integration/chatbridge/scenarios/weather-dashboard-flagship.test.ts
